topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Mercury compiler. Mercury combines logic programming with types and modes.

topics.label: Predicates & Functions
topics.description: pred for relations, func for deterministic computations. Strongly typed.

topics.label: Modes & Determinism
topics.description: in, out, di, uo mode declarations. det, semidet, nondet, multi determinism.

topics.label: Types
topics.description: Algebraic data types, type classes, and polymorphism. Caught at compile time.

topics.label: Modules
topics.description: Module system with interface and implementation sections.

topics.label: I/O & State
topics.description: I/O through unique state threading (io.state). Pure by default.
